steps.title: Use a plain plural noun
steps.content: The blank is the object of the preposition by. The chemists are the people using the emulsifiers, so the sentence needs a plain plural noun, not a possessive form.

steps.title: Remove possessive errors
steps.content: Choice A is a plural possessive, Choice B is a singular possessive, and Choice D puts a possessive on the wrong word. None expresses simple users of emulsifiers. The answer is C.
